title: Foundations of Linear Algebra
description: A rigorous yet approachable introduction to vector spaces, linear maps, eigenvalues and the spectral theorem, with worked examples and exercises designed for first-year undergraduates.
subject: math

title: Introduction to Statistics with Python
description: Learn descriptive and inferential statistics through hands-on Python notebooks covering distributions, hypothesis testing, regression and resampling methods.
subject: stats

title: Applied Statistics with R
description: A practical, project-driven course in applied statistics using the R language and the tidyverse, from exploratory data analysis to mixed-effects models.
subject: stats

title: Algorithms and Data Structures
description: Covers asymptotic analysis, sorting and searching, trees, graphs, dynamic programming and complexity theory, with language-agnostic pseudocode throughout.
subject: cs

title: Cálculo Diferencial e Integral
description: Curso completo de cálculo de una variable: límites, derivadas, integrales y series, con énfasis en la intuición geométrica y aplicaciones físicas.
subject: math

title: Machine Learning in Python
description: From linear models to neural networks, this hands-on text builds intuition for supervised and unsupervised learning using scikit-learn and PyTorch.
subject: cs

title: Probabilités et Statistiques
description: Une introduction soignée à la théorie des probabilités et à l'inférence statistique, des variables aléatoires aux tests d'hypothèses, avec exercices corrigés.
subject: stats

title: Discrete Mathematics for Computing
description: Logic, set theory, combinatorics, graph theory and number theory presented with a computing audience in mind, including proofs and applications to algorithms.
subject: math

title: Datenanalyse mit R
description: Eine praxisnahe Einführung in die Datenanalyse mit R: Datenaufbereitung, Visualisierung mit ggplot2 und statistische Modellierung anhand realer Datensätze.
subject: stats

title: Foundations of Deep Learning
description: A mathematically grounded treatment of deep learning: backpropagation, optimisation, convolutional and recurrent architectures, attention and transformers.
subject: cs
